title: Kurla Bike Theft Ring
description: Eleven motorcycles stolen from Kurla and Ghatkopar over 15 days. All bikes were 150cc or above. Stolen using master keys, no damage to locks. Bikes resold in Bihar and UP with forged RCs. One recovery made by UP police flagged the Mumbai connection.
modus_operandi: Organised ring, master key operation, targeting mid-range bikes, interstate resale with forged documents.

suspects.description: Male, local coordinator, identified by UP police tip

evidence.description: VAHAN database showed forged RC numbers clustered to a single agent in Patna
Kurla station parking camera captured theft of bike 3, suspect face visible
Master key set recovered from suspect on arrest

blind_spots: VAHAN database check not done until day 12
UP police tip not acted upon for 3 days
No geographic theft pattern mapped until day 8
resolution: VAHAN trace led to Patna agent who gave up Mumbai coordinator. Arrested day 16. Ring of 5 dismantled.
